/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/EMTERM/SATERM/SA1:BRYENTON MCCLAN/SAORD1/SAORD/VD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 03-04-22/CONTD: TERMINATION & DISMISSAL/DAWF/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/OR/WEAP/WS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1: BRYENTON MCCLAN/SA4: 200 BLOCK OF 9TH ST, SF, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/X: THE 10TH LAST DAY IS WAIVED/STWPX/CONTD: REFERRAL TO BEHAVIORIAL HEALTH COURT IN DEPT 07 ON 01-13-22/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:LISA DEWBERRY/X:THE PEOPLE FILE A MOTION TO DETAIN//TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:01-04-22 (10TH)/SHER/BAIL: 30,000/SA1:BRYENTON MCCLAM/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/30    CACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER ISREFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 12-29-21/DOP/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 1 HOUR/DOP/
